Sources<ref>https://www.meaningcrisis.co/ep-12-awakening-from-the-meaning-crisis-higher-states-of-consciousness-part-2-2/</ref><ref>https://www.meaningcrisis.co/higher-states-of-consciousness-part-1/</ref><ref>https://www.meaningcrisis.co/ep-33-awakening-from-the-meaning-crisis-the-spirituality-of-rr-wonder-awe-mystery-sacredness/</ref><ref>https://www.meaningcrisis.co/ep-13-awakening-from-the-meaning-crisis-buddhism-and-parasitic-processing/</ref><ref>https://www.meaningcrisis.co/ep-37-awakening-from-the-meaning-crisis-reverse-engineering-enlightenment-part-2/</ref><ref>https://www.meaningcrisis.co/category/vervaeke/</ref><ref>https://www.meaningcrisis.co/author/meaningcrisis_k2zi2i/</ref>

== References ==

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Joy]][[Category:Psychology]]
[[Category:Pages]]
